payload.answer: I can’t commit a durable memory from this because it lacks specific, verifiable details.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is too vague ('the thing from yesterday') with no identifiable details to store safely and durably.

details: No memory card created due to insufficient information.

repair_options: Tell me what the thing from yesterday was (event/topic).
Include any key details (people involved, place, time, or what was decided).
Clarify whether this is something you want me to remember long-term or just for today.
